title: hariota rhombea
intro: Hariota rhombea, also known as the rhomboid hariota, is a plant species belonging to the genus Hariota, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hariota rhombea include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Hariota rhombea can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions for consumption, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and salves for skin conditions.
